text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I saw it! A vast expanse stretching ahead of me
with no one else in sight... It's almost a shame I
had to cross the finish line...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Maybe I'll see it again next race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's right. I got first place. I was so focused...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I was able to concentrate completely on running...
It was a good race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes... I wish I could have run a bit longer.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer. I'm looking forward to the next race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want to see that scenery again and again.
